---
name: inflected-writer
description: Applies surgical edits to files; pure regression target for unused-tool-grant.
tools: [Read, Write]
---

This agent exists solely to exercise the inflected-form branch of the
unused-tool-grant regex. Its prose deliberately avoids the bare verbs
`write` and `edit` — instead it talks about surgical edits, careful
editing, and files already written. Because a Write tool has been granted
and the body clearly demonstrates intent, this agent must not be flagged
as having an unused grant.
